scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run test:smoke
scripts.test:unit: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py unit && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py unit && pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:api
scripts.test:integration: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py integration && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py integration
scripts.test:e2e: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py e2e && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py e2e
scripts.test:smoke: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py smoke && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py smoke
scripts.lint: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py lint && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py lint && pnpm --filter @monopoly-ai-game/web run lint && pnpm --filter @monopoly-ai-game/api run lint
scripts.typecheck: uv run --no-sync python scripts/phase0_check.py typecheck && uv run --no-sync python scripts/scaffold_check.py typecheck && pnpm --filter @monopoly-ai-game/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @monopoly-ai-game/api run typecheck
scripts.review: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
